autoCombat.name: Auto-add Black ICE to combat
autoCombat.hint: When a Black ICE is summoned, automatically add it as a combatant with initiative rolled from its SPD.

autoDestroy.name: Auto-derez programs at 0 REZ
autoDestroy.hint: When a program's REZ is reduced to 0 by a Black ICE attack, automatically flip isRezzed to false.

showHud.name: Show Tile HUD summon button
showHud.hint: Display a 'Summon Black ICE' button on the Tile HUD for any tile detected as a Black ICE tile (from flags or texture name).

autoSpawn.name: Auto-spawn Black ICE on tile crossing (experimental)
autoSpawn.hint: When a netrunner token moves onto a Black ICE tile, automatically summon the corresponding Black ICE. Disabled by default.

dialog.summonPrompt: Pick a Black ICE type. You'll then choose the target netrunner.

notifications.gmOnly: Only the GM can summon Black ICE.
notifications.noScene: No active scene to drop a Black ICE token on.
notifications.packsMissing: This module's compendium packs aren't loaded. Is the module enabled?
notifications.packEntryMissing: No pack entry found for Black ICE '{key}'.
notifications.notBlackIce: Selected actor is not a Black ICE.
notifications.noLinkedProgram: This Black ICE has no linked program item.
notifications.programDestroyed: Program {name} has been destroyed (REZ reduced to 0).
notifications.noNetrunners: No netrunners on this scene. A token's actor needs the Netrunner role (or a cyberdeck) to be picked.
notifications.noAttackTargets: No character or mook tokens on this scene to attack.
notifications.noCandidates: No matching tokens on this scene.
